name: Miss Universe 2021
overview: Miss Universe 2021 was the 70th Miss Universe pageant, held on December 12, 2021 at Universe Dome in Eilat, Israel. Andrea Meza of Mexico crowned Harnaaz Sandhu of India as her successor at the end of the event. This is India's first victory after 21 years, and its third in history.

trailers.title: The 70th MISS UNIVERSE CROWNING MOMENT! | Miss Universe
